mnemonics.title: Abstract Classes
mnemonics.content: Abstract classes are like blueprints for objects that share common characteristics and behaviors.

mnemonics.title: Interfaces
mnemonics.content: Interfaces are like contracts that must be implemented by any class that implements it.

mnemonics.title: Abstract Methods
mnemonics.content: Abstract methods are like methods that must be implemented by any class that inherits from an abstract class.

acronyms.usage: The ABC class is used to define an abstract base class in Python.
OOP is a programming paradigm that focuses on objects and their interactions.

visualTips.visualization: Think of an abstract class as a blueprint for a house. Just like how a blueprint provides a plan for building a house, an abstract class provides a plan for creating objects that share common characteristics and behaviors.

Think of an interface as a contract between two parties. Just like how a contract outlines the terms and conditions of an agreement, an interface outlines the methods that must be implemented by any class that implements it.

analogies.analogy: An abstract class is like a recipe for making a cake. Just like how a recipe provides a set of instructions for making a cake, an abstract class provides a set of instructions for creating objects that share common characteristics and behaviors.

An interface is like a set of rules for playing a game. Just like how rules outline the way a game should be played, an interface outlines the methods that must be implemented by any class that implements it.
